name: Rechargeable LED Collapsible Portable Camp Lantern Orange - Embark™️
description:
This Rechargeable LED Collapsible Lantern from Embark™ is a handy companion for camping, spelunking and other outdoor adventures. Featuring a convenient collapsible design that makes it easy to pack and take on the go, this LED lantern has a solar-rechargeable battery with a solar panel on the top. It has high, medium and low light modes and a maximum light distance of nine meters, and a top handle makes it easy to carry. You can also charge your own devices with the USB-C port. Best of all, the water- and impact-resistant construction promotes lasting outdoor use.

Embark™: Find wonder as you wander.
